cluster_samples.cluster_title: 今天看到一个牛逼的公式： 智力=速度x正确。
core_facts: Author reflects on a formula: Intelligence = Speed × Correctness. AI amplifies speed but correctness is still uncertain. AGI would require AI to tell you what to do to make money.
